channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter, 23rd March
item.description:
A Uber delivery was ordered and delivered by 2 people in a parked car opposite 72 Hyde Vale. They ate the food and left the bag on the pavement which attracted birds and squirrels. I went to clear the mess. We need the pavement at this section litter cleaned every week, the pavement is full of litter, which I have cleared a number of times. The bin is only 20 feet away from where they were parked.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hyde Vale, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cabinet next to ULEZ camera post is knocked over leaving exposed wiring., 23rd March
item.description:
Knocked over cabinet next to ULEZ camera post. This has been reported before and then repaired, now damaged again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Lower Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish from black sack over pavement and road, 23rd March
item.description:
Rubbish over the pavement, and road. Pedestrians are having to walk in the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sherman Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant flytipping in Durfey Place, 23rd March
item.description:
Flytipping in Durfey Place remains a constant issue. I have already raised this within several complaints. It is now happening almost every day, and it continues to have a real impact on residents. Ms Sophia Opoku-Addo, Resident Services Officer for this area, never replied to any emails about the issue and the working group set up by her predecessor. This is simply unacceptable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Edmund Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kerbs broken and dropped, 23rd March
item.description:
The kerbs along the cycle lane broken and uneven. Kerbs across road have dropped.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thistlebrook, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-bikes on Truman's Road junction with Stoke Newington, 23rd March
item.description:
At around 10.30pm on Friday night at the junction of Truman's Road and Stoke Newington there were multiple e-bikes parked on the path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Truman's Road, Shacklewell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead rat found in front garden, 23rd March
item.description:
Dead rat found in between two planters in front garden of 73 Priolo Road. Seems very recently dead and flies around it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Swallowfield Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Fridge, 23rd March
item.description:
A fridge has been dumped on the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Congress Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Block C Argo House, 23rd March
item.description:
Multiple complaints from residents advising that heavy vehicles travelling over potholes is preventing them from sleeping at night and cause lots of vibrations (i'm the Property Manager for all of Argo House).
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street map, 23rd March
item.description:
St map

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Holmes Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes parked on pavement along Upper Clapton Rd jct with Brooke road, 23rd March
item.description:
We continue to see pavement parking along Upper Clapton Road, particularly opposite BLOK Clapton on the footway next to the junction with Brooke Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Clapton Road, Clapton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish spilling onto the street, 23rd March
item.description:
North Cross Road, outside Meet Bernard. Bin used for market that has not been collected and is now spilling rubbish all over the pavement/road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, North Cross Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress and cabinet, 23rd March
item.description:
Corner of Tyssen and Bayston Rd.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bayston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Been there for a few weeks now, not MOT., 23rd March
item.description:
This vehicle has a smashed back window and not too sure if it has been stolen.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hailey Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pallets, bin bags, loose litter on pavement, 23rd March
item.description:
Despite reporting it previously (ref. 9153859) and told it was resolved, the pallets are still there and rubbish bags and other litter have been dumped with them.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oldhill Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Takeaway food rubbish, 23rd March
item.description:
Neighbours are leaving takeaway food rubbish in their front garden. It has been building up over the last couple of months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gloucester Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking the Turning Bay, 23rd March
item.description:
This van regularly blocks the turning bay forcing the local traffic on the close to use people's driveways to turnaround. This has been reported to the police, but this owner is very beligerent and is offencive when you ask him to park in the parking bays

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Neville Close, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere on street, 23rd March
item.description:
The constant problem of litter outside bramfield court is worse than usual. its all over both sides of the street, on the grass. please could you send a team to fix it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dump bag, 23rd March
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 23/03/26 15:41 Robin wy entrce hawkinge dump bag brken glass/cans/fast gaz
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hawkinge Walk, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: See location in map, 23rd March
item.description:
Bagged waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hazelmere Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag
